samples.title: SuperSender Pro — WhatsApp broadcast SaaS
samples.summary: Built a multi-tenant WhatsApp broadcast platform: tenant-scoped Postgres data layer, Redis queue + rate limits, JWT auth with RBAC, and Stripe billing.

samples.title: GigHunter AI — autonomous freelancing agent
samples.summary: AI agent that hunts gigs from 10 platforms, scores them with local LLM + embeddings, and drafts tailored proposals.

samples.title: Laser Rate-Equation Simulation (LASERSIM)
samples.summary: Numerical platform modeling laser rate equations with configurable parameters and visualization.
